name: HMS Amphion (P 439)
events: The history of HMS Amphion as compiled on this page is extracted from the logbooks of this submarine.
This page was last updated in December 2019.
8 Feb 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) arrived at Holy Loch for preliminary trials. (1)
15 Feb 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) returned to her builders yard at Barrow for inspection after preliminary trials. (1)
27 Mar 1945 After acceptance trials, HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) departed her builders yard at Barrow for Holy Loch. She was escorted by HMCS Monnow (Cdr. E.G. Skinner, DSO, RCNR). (2)
28 Mar 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) arrived at Holy Loch to begin a work-up period of trials and training off the Scottish West coast.
As Amphion was the first ship of her class this would take longer then normal. (2)
31 Mar 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) is docked at Holy Loch for a propeller change. (2)
1 Apr 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) is undocked. (3)
2 Apr 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted speed trials on the Arran measured mile. (3)
3 Apr 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted exercises in the Clyde area. (3)
4 Apr 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted noise trials in Loch Goil. (3)
5 Apr 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted noise trials in Loch Goil. (3)
6 Apr 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted noise trials in Loch Goil. (3)
7 Apr 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted noise trials in Loch Goil. Upon completion of these HMS Amphion proceeded to Holy Loch. (3)
11 Apr 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO and 2 Bars, RN) departed Holy Loch for two days of trials and exercises with HMS Hastings (A/Cdr. E.A. Stocker, DSC, RN). (3)
13 Apr 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) returned to Holy Loch upon completion of a few days of trials and exercises. (3)
17 Apr 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO and 2 Bars, RN) conducted gunnery trials and exercises in the Clyde area. (3)
18 Apr 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted exercises in the Clyde area. (3)
19 Apr 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO and 2 Bars, RN) departed Holy Loch for Scapa Flow. She was escorted by HMS Duncan (Lt.Cdr. D.G.D. Hall-Wright, RN). (3)
20 Apr 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) arrived at Scapa Flow. (3)
21 Apr 1945 HMS Trusty (Lt. W. St.G. Anderson, DSC, RNR) served as target at/off Scapa Flow during radar exercises for HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO and 2 Bars, RN). (4)
22 Apr 1945 HMS Trusty (Lt. W. St.G. Anderson, DSC, RNR) served as target at/off Scapa Flow during radar exercises for HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO and 2 Bars, RN). (5)
23 Apr 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO and 2 Bars, RN) conducted radar exercises at/off Scapa Flow. (3)
25 Apr 1945 HMS Trusty (Lt. W. St.G. Anderson, DSC, RNR) served as target at/off Scapa Flow during radar exercises for HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO and 2 Bars, RN). (4)
27 Apr 1945 Around 1050 B/27, HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO and 2 Bars, RN) departed Scapa Flow for Holy Loch. She was escorted by HMS Shikari (Lt. E.A. Tyrer, DSC, RN).
They were joined around 2015 B/27, near the Trodday lighthouse, by HMS Trespasser (Lt. L.E. Herrick, DSC, RN) and HMS Tactician (Lt.Cdr. L.N.A. Jewell, DSC, MBE, RN). (3)

28 Apr 1945 Around 1830 B/28, HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO and 2 Bars, RN), HMS Trespasser (Lt. L.E. Herrick, DSC, RN), HMS Tactician (Lt. B.L.D. Rowe, DSC, RN) and their escort HMS Shikari (Lt. E.A. Tyrer, DSC, RN) arrived at Holy Loch. (6)
30 Apr 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) shifted from Holy Loch to the torpedo firing range at Arrochar. (3)
1 May 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials at the torpedo firing range off Arrochar. (7)
2 May 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials at the torpedo firing range off Arrochar. (7)
3 May 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials at the torpedo firing range off Arrochar. (7)

22 May 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials at the torpedo firing range off Arrochar. (7)
23 May 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials at the torpedo firing range off Arrochar. (7)
24 May 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials at the torpedo firing range off Arrochar. (7)
25 May 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials at the torpedo firing range off Arrochar. (7)
27 May 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials at the torpedo firing range off Arrochar. (7)
28 May 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials at the torpedo firing range off Arrochar. (7)
29 May 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials at the torpedo firing range off Arrochar. (7)
30 May 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials at the torpedo firing range off Arrochar. Upon completion of these HMS Amphion proceeded to Holy Loch. (7)
31 May 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) is docked in AFD 7 at Holy Loch for bottom cleaning and painting of the hull. (2) (7)
1 Jun 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) is undocked. (8)
4 Jun 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) shifted from Holy Loch to Arrochar and then conducted torpedo discharge trials at the torpedo firing range. (8)
5 Jun 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials at the torpedo firing range off Arrochar. (8)
6 Jun 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials at the torpedo firing range off Arrochar. (8)
7 Jun 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials at the torpedo firing range off Arrochar. (8)
8 Jun 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted full power trials off Arrochar. (8)
12 Jun 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted minelaying trials off Arrochar. (8)
13 Jun 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted minelaying trials off Arrochar. (8)
14 Jun 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted vibration measuring trials off Arrochar. (8)
15 Jun 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted minelaying trials off Arrochar. (8)

24 Jun 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials at the torpedo firing range off Arrochar. (8)

27 Jun 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted engine trials off Arrochar. (8)
28 Jun 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted engine trials off Arrochar followed by torpedo discharge trials. (8)
29 Jun 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials at the torpedo firing range off Arrochar. (8)
1 Jul 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials at the torpedo firing range off Arrochar. (9)

11 Jul 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials at the torpedo firing range off Arrochar. (9)
12 Jul 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials at the torpedo firing range off Arrochar. (9)
13 Jul 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) shifted from Arrochar to Holy Loch. (9)
16 Jul 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) conducted vibration measuring trials in the Clyde area. (9)
17 Jul 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) departed Holy Loch to return to her builders yard at Barrow. (9)
18 Jul 1945 HMS Amphion (Cdr. R.H. Dewhurst, DSO, RN) arrived at her builders yard at Barrow to undergo repairs and modifications. When the war with Japan ended she was still there. (9)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
